results.justification: EXACT TWIN — paper LITERALLY titled 'Atlas of ... Attention Heads' categorizing head types via attribution; IS the canonical-profile-atlas head-classification mechanism with different feature space.
EXACT TWIN — k-means with summaries-as-centroids IS the centroid-atlas catalog mechanism with different centroid representation.
Cluster-granularity attention with precomputed centroids overlaps with bore-profile-centroid attention-head atlas.
EXACT TWIN — comprehensive attention-head function-cluster taxonomy IS the canonical-bore-profile head-class atlas concept.
EXACT TWIN — entropy-based head-defect-score for correct/incorrect IS the mahalanobis-based-defect-score mechanism with different distance metric.
Mahalanobis-distance unsupervised anomaly-detection IS the mahalanobis-residual-cluster defect mechanism with different artifact domain.
Mahalanobis SVDD compact-hyperspace projection IS the projection-to-nearest-centroid repair mechanism with different finetune target.
Distance-based out-of-distribution state-outlier framework IS the residual-cluster-defect identification with different artifact domain.
